name: Smart Order Execution & Optimization
description: Advanced order execution: TWAP/VWAP splitting for large orders, pre-trade slippage estimation, order book depth analysis, exchange latency benchmarking, smart order routing across exchanges.
prompt: Advanced order execution: TWAP/VWAP splitting for large orders, pre-trade slippage estimation, order book depth analysis, exchange latency benchmarking, smart order routing across exchanges, partial fill handling, and retry logic with backoff.
